query: Add these five skills to 0langas-skill-center, make them tri-client, add evals, update README, sync links, and test everything.
reason: This is a full skill-center orchestration request.
expected_routing: Run the curator order across docs cache, porting, evals, sync, README, and tests.

query: I renamed a skill and now the repo has old candidates, broken symlinks, and stale eval names. Curate it.
reason: The user asks for multi-surface repo cleanup across docs, links, and evals.
expected_routing: Use curator as orchestrator and agent-install-sync for the link portion.

query: Before pushing this skill-center change, run the readiness pass for README, provider links, docs cache, and trigger evals.
reason: Pre-publish skill-center readiness is the curator's final-pass responsibility.
expected_routing: Run deterministic validation and report commit readiness.

query: Only fix the missing ~/.codex/skills symlink for muteman.
reason: A narrow install repair should route directly to agent-install-sync.

query: Create trigger eval prompts for one existing skill.
reason: A narrow eval-only request belongs to skill-trigger-evalsmith.

query: Look up the latest Kimi Code docs for plugin configuration.
reason: Provider docs lookup alone belongs to official-ai-devdocs.
expected_routing: Use official-ai-devdocs and cache evidence only if useful.
